title: Upwork Application Tracker (Form → Sheets Dashboard)
problem: Freelancers apply to dozens of jobs but track them in scattered notes or memory — no reply rate, no hire rate, and no idea whether the Connects they spend actually pay off.
solution: A Google Form logs each application to Sheets in one tap; an Apps Script trigger stamps every new row with a status dropdown, and a formula-driven dashboard auto-computes reply rate, hire rate, Connects cost vs. earnings, and 6-month trends. The form, sheet, and dashboard are all generated by code — zero manual spreadsheet setup.
result: Logging an application takes under 30 seconds from any device. Reply and hire rates are visible at a glance, and the net profit line (earnings minus Connects cost) shows whether the bidding strategy is actually working. Pure Google stack — no subscriptions.

images.caption: One-tap logging form — bilingual labels, works from mobile
Auto-logged applications with status dropdown per row
Live KPI dashboard: reply rate, hire rate, and Connects ROI
